title: Engineering Shared Access FAQ
items: AWS baseline access requests go to CloudOps via #it-aws-access rather than the generic helpdesk queue.
GitHub org access auto-provisions only when the employee email matches the linked GitHub account.
Badge pickup after 5 PM often fails; schedule reception collection during business hours.

title: Contractor Exception Notes
items: Contractors need the external Jira license and often require a manual correction from IT.
Contractor provisioning runs through a slower queue; communicate that delay proactively.
Vault requests for contractors require both NDA completion and compliance training confirmation.
